description_long: This is a large wooden skateboarding half-pipe structure, featuring a smooth, curved ramp surface on both sides and a flat platform in the center. The ramp is constructed from light-colored wood panels, with a consistent grain pattern visible throughout. Metal safety railings run along the top edges of the ramp and the upper platform, providing protection for users. On one end, a tall staircase with railings leads up to the platform, allowing access to the top of the ramp. The structure is open in the middle, with a rectangular cutout beneath the central platform, creating a tunnel-like passage. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities in an urban park or recreational area.
description: A large wooden skateboarding half-pipe with metal railings, a central platform, and a staircase for access. The structure features smooth curved ramps and a tunnel-like opening beneath the platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the half-pipe, the central platform with a tunnel opening, and the staircase on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view from above, highlighting the curved ramp surfaces, the flat central platform, and the safety railings along the top edges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the half-pipe, the tunnel opening, and the staircase structure on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the interior of the half-pipe, the smooth ramp surfaces, and the staircase leading up to the platform.
